title: Sales Manager Vacancy at REA India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at REA India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? REA India in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About REA India:
REA India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with REA India!
